files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+version: 2
+updates:
+  - package-ecosystem: "npm"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+    groups:
+      dependencies:
+        patterns: ["*"]
+  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+    groups:
+      actions:
+        patterns: ["*"]
